title: Botany Pots - Mystical Agriculture Compat
description: The world of mystical agriculture now in a botany pot!
body:
This addon brings the mysterious world of Mystical Agriculture to Botany Pots! With this mod installed all crops and soils added by the Mystical Agriculture mod and the Mystical Aggriditions addon should be supported!

## How It Works
The Mystical Agriculture mod gives each seed a tier. For a seed to be planted in a botany pot it must be planted in a soil that matches or exceeds its tier. For example a tier one crop like dirt seeds can be placed in any mystical farmland, while a tier two seed like amethyst must be planted in a tier two soil like prudentium farmland, or a higher tier soil like imperium farmland. When the crop is grown it can be harvested for essence, more seeds, and sometimes fertilized essence.

Inferium farmland will grow crops 15% faster. The growth speed increases by 5% for each tier, so at tier 6 Insanium will grow crops 40% faster. These soils are not limited to mystical crops and can also grow any other crop that grows in dirt type blocks like wheat and carrots.

Tier 1 crops will take one minute to grow under normal circumstances. The growth time is increased by 25% for each tier, so at tier 6 a crop will take two minutes and fifteen seconds.

## Supported Mods & Addons
This addon supports all seeds and soils added by the base Mystical Agriculture mod. It also adds support for the content added by the Mystical Aggriditions addon. Crops added by the Mystical Customization mod are NOT supported by default. I have added support for a small subset of custom crops that are common or popular, but if you are making new crops with Mystical Customization it is your responsibility to add the necesary botany pots files as well. You can learn more about this by checking the files on GitHub.

## Configuration Options
Config files for this mod are created in your games config folder when you launch the game with the mod installed. Currrently you can configure the current properties.
- The base growth time for all crops of a given tier. For example you can change tier two crops from their base growth time of 1:15 to 2:00.
- You can disable the soil tier requirement, which will make all mystical crops grow on dirt or any other dirt like soil.
- You can prevent botany pots from producing fertilized essence.
- You can prevent botany pots from producing extra seed items.

If you want to change properties of individual crops like their growth speed, permitted soils, drops, render options, etc, these are all managed by the datapack system. Config files will not be provided for these as you can already modify datapack files with existing tools.
